Part.Source:
Do Case Case &EmpCmp < 381 Do 'SQL_Reorg_16.2.144'
Case &EmpCmp < 382 Do 'SQL_Reorg_16.2.145'
Case &EmpCmp < 383 Do 'SQL_Reorg_16.2.146'
CAse &EmpCmp < 384 Do 'SQL_Reorg_16.2.147'
CAse &EmpCmp < 385 Do 'SQL_Reorg_16.2.148'
CAse &EmpCmp < 386 Do 'SQL_Reorg_16.2.149'
CAse &EmpCmp < 387 Do 'SQL_Reorg_16.2.150'
CAse &EmpCmp < 388 Do 'SQL_Reorg_17.388'
CAse &EmpCmp < 389 Do 'SQL_Reorg_17.389'
CAse &EmpCmp < 390 Do 'SQL_Reorg_17.390'
CAse &EmpCmp < 391 Do 'SQL_Reorg_17.391'
CAse &EmpCmp < 392 Do 'SQL_Reorg_17.392'
CAse &EmpCmp < 393 Do 'SQL_Reorg_17.393'
CAse &EmpCmp < 394 Do 'SQL_Reorg_17.394'
Case &EmpCmp < 395 Do 'SQL_Reorg_17.395'
Case &EmpCmp < 396 Do 'SQL_Reorg_17.396'
Case &EmpCmp < 397 Do 'SQL_Reorg_17.397'
Case &EmpCmp < 398 Do 'SQL_Reorg_17.398'
Case &EmpCmp < 399 Do 'SQL_Reorg_17.399'
Case &EmpCmp < 400 Do 'SQL_Reorg_17.400' EndCAse
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.400'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'TCon148') ALTER TABLE [ConfSistema] ADD [TCon148] VARCHAR(1) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " alter table agendador alter column agdexefilcod numeric(9) " Do 'RodaScript' EndSub
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.399' &sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'AgdExeFilCod') ALTER TABLE [Agendador] ADD [AgdExeFilCod] NUmeric(9) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'ProDedIcms') ALTER TABLE [Produto] ADD [ProDedIcms] BIT NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'ProDedIpi') ALTER TABLE [Produto] ADD [ProDedIpi] BIT NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'NfeProPisRed') ALTER TABLE [NotasProdutos] ADD [NfeProPisRed] DECIMAL(7,4) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'NfeProCofinsRed') ALTER TABLE [NotasProdutos] ADD [NfeProCofinsRed] DECIMAL(7,4) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'ImpPisRed') ALTER TABLE [TabelaImposto] ADD [ImpPisRed] DECIMAL(7,4) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'ImpCofinsRed') ALTER TABLE [TabelaImposto] ADD [ImpCofinsRed] DECIMAL(7,4) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
EndSub
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.398' &sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'CteDtaHorVia') ALTER TABLE [Cte] ADD [CteDtaHorVia] DATETIME NULL" Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'CteTipFrt') ALTER TABLE [Cte] ADD [CteTipFrt] SMALLINT NULL" Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'ProImgVend_GXI') ALTER TABLE [Produto] ADD [ProImgVend_GXI] VARCHAR(2048) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'ProImgVend') ALTER TABLE [Produto] ADD [ProImgVend] VARBINARY(MAX) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'PedStsSyncServ') ALTER TABLE [Pedido] ADD [PedStsSyncServ] VARCHAR(1) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'PedCxCod') ALTER TABLE [Pedido] ADD [PedCxCod] INT NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'PesCliCrdUti') ALTER TABLE [Pessoa] ADD [PesCliCrdUti] DECIMAL(17,2) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'NfeStsSyncServ') ALTER TABLE [Notas] ADD [NfeStsSyncServ] VARCHAR(1) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
EndSub
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.397' &sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.tables where name = 'CTEPercurso') CREATE TABLE [CTEPercurso] (" &sql += " [EmpCod] INT NOT NULL, " &sql += " [FilCod] INT NOT NULL, " &sql += " [CteCod] INT NOT NULL, " &sql += " [CtePerCod] INT NOT NULL, " &sql += " [CtePerUfeCod] VARCHAR(2) NULL, " &sql += " PRIMARY KEY ( [EmpCod],[FilCod],[CteCod],[CtePerCod] )) "
Do 'RodaScript' EndSub
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.396' &sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'TefPlanCod') ALTER TABLE [TEF] ADD [TefPlanCod] INT NULL " Do 'RodaScript' EndSub
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.395' &sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'TefPlanCod') ALTER TABLE [TEF] ADD [TefPlanCod] INT NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'TefImpCod') ALTER TABLE [TEF] ADD [TefImpCod] INT NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'PedFrpAutCrt') ALTER TABLE [PedidoPgto] ADD [PedFrpAutCrt] VARCHAR(40) NULL " Do 'RodaScript' EndSub
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.394' &sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'TbFilRegTrib') ALTER TABLE [TabelaImpostoGrupo] ADD [TbFilRegTrib] VARCHAR(1) NULL " Do 'RodaScript' &sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'TbImpUfeCod') ALTER TABLE [TabelaImpostoGrupo] ADD [TbImpUfeCod] VARCHAR(2) NULL " Do 'RodaScript' prcGrupoFilialImposto.Call(0) EndSub
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.393'
//GRUPO TABELA IMPOSTO FILIAL &sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.tables where name = 'TabelaImpostoGrupo') CREATE TABLE [TabelaImpostoGrupo] ( " &sql += " [EmpCod] INT NOT NULL, " &sql += " [TbImpFilCod] INT NOT NULL, " &sql += " [TbImpFilNom] VARCHAR(100) NULL, " &sql += " [TbImpFilCodNom] VARCHAR(100) NULL, " &sql += " [TbFilRegTrib] VARCHAR(1) NULL, " &sql += " [TbImpUfeCod] VARCHAR(2) NULL, " &sql += " PRIMARY KEY ( [EmpCod],[TbImpFilCod] )) " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'TCon147') ALTER TABLE [ConfSistema] ADD [TCon147] VARCHAR(1) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
//BASE PIS E COFINS &sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'tmpProBasCofins') ALTER TABLE [NotaTemporariaProduto] ADD [tmpProBasCofins] DECIMAL(17,2) NULL " Do 'RodaScript' &sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'tmpProBasPIS') ALTER TABLE [NotaTemporariaProduto] ADD [tmpProBasPIS] DECIMAL(17,2) NULL " Do 'RodaScript' &sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'NfeProBasPIS') ALTER TABLE [NotasProdutos] ADD [NfeProBasPIS] DECIMAL(17,2) NULL " Do 'RodaScript' &sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'NfeProBasCofins') ALTER TABLE [NotasProdutos] ADD [NfeProBasCofins] DECIMAL(17,2) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
//NOTA SERVICO &sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'tmpIssVlr') ALTER TABLE [NotaTemporaria] ADD [tmpIssVlr] DECIMAL(17,2) NULL" Do 'RodaScript' &sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'tmpIssTax') ALTER TABLE [NotaTemporaria] ADD [tmpIssTax] DECIMAL(7,4) NULL" Do 'RodaScript' &sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'tmpIssBasVlr') ALTER TABLE [NotaTemporaria] ADD [tmpIssBasVlr] DECIMAL(17,2) NULL" Do 'RodaScript' EndSub
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.392' &sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.tables where name = 'ImportacaoProduto') CREATE TABLE [dbo].[ImportacaoProduto]( " &sql += " [IpPro] [varchar](40) NOT NULL, " &sql += " [IpDtaHor] [datetime] NULL, " &sql += " PRIMARY KEY CLUSTERED " &sql += " ( " &sql += " [IpPro] ASC " &sql += " )WITH (PAD_INDEX = OFF, STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF, IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF, ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON, ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON) ON [PRIMARY] " &sql += " ) ON [PRIMARY] " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.tables where name = 'ImportacaoProdutoItem') CREATE TABLE [dbo].[ImportacaoProdutoItem]( " &sql += " [IpPro] [varchar](40) NOT NULL, " &sql += " [IpProItm] [int] NOT NULL, " &sql += " [IpProCod] [int] NULL, " &sql += " [IpProNom] [varchar](100) NULL, " &sql += " [IpNcmCod] [int] NULL, " &sql += " [IpProNcmCest] [int] NULL, " &sql += " [IpMarCod] [int] NULL, " &sql += " [IpMarNom] [varchar](100) NULL, " &sql += " [IpSetCod] [int] NULL, " &sql += " [IpGrupCod] [int] NULL, " &sql += " [IpTabPrc1] [decimal](17, 2) NULL, " &sql += " [IpProVlrCus] [decimal](17, 5) NULL, " &sql += " [IpCatCod] [int] NULL, " &sql += " [IpEmbCod] [int] NULL, " &sql += " [IpIsAchou] [bit] NULL, " &sql += " [IpEmpCod] [int] NULL, " &sql += " [IpMensagem] [varchar](500) NULL, " &sql += " [IpProRef] [varchar](40) NULL, " &sql += " PRIMARY KEY CLUSTERED " &sql += " ( " &sql += " [IpPro] ASC, " &sql += " [IpProItm] ASC " &sql += " )WITH (PAD_INDEX = OFF, STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF, IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF, ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON, ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON) ON [PRIMARY] " &sql += " ) ON [PRIMARY] " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'TempDtaMod') ALTER TABLE [TempRentabilidade] ADD [TempDtaMod] DATETIME NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'DupTmpDtaMod') ALTER TABLE [TmpDuplicatas] ADD [DupTmpDtaMod] DATETIME NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'tmpNfeDtaMod') ALTER TABLE [NotaTemporaria] ADD [tmpNfeDtaMod] DATETIME NULL " Do 'RodaScript' EndSub
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.391'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'TCon146') ALTER TABLE [ConfSistema] ADD [TCon146] SMALLINT NULL " Do 'RodaScript' &sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'TCon145') ALTER TABLE [ConfSistema] ADD [TCon145] VARCHAR(1) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'TCon144') ALTER TABLE [ConfSistema] ADD [TCon144] VARCHAR(1) NULL " Do 'RodaScript' EndSub
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.390'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'CrePagSts') ALTER TABLE DuplicatasPagamento add CrePagSts Varchar(1) null " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'MovSts') ALTER TABLE Movimento add MovSts Varchar(1) null " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'MovItmSts') ALTER TABLE MovimentoItem add MovItmSts Varchar(1) null " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'RemRetSdtJson') ALTER TABLE [RemessaRetorno] ADD [RemRetSdtJson] VARCHAR(MAX) NULL " Do 'RodaScript' EndSUb
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.389'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'RemRetSdtJson') ALTER TABLE [RemessaRetorno] ADD [RemRetSdtJson] VARCHAR(MAX) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'PedVlrIpi') ALTER TABLE [Pedido] ADD [PedVlrIpi] DECIMAL(17,2) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " IF EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'tmpNfeProEmbQtd') ALTER TABLE [NotaTemporariaProduto] DROP COLUMN [tmpNfeProEmbQtd] " Do 'RodaScript' EndSub
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_17.388' &sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'LctModPad') ALTER TABLE [TipoLancamento] ADD [LctModPad] VARCHAR(2) NULL " Do 'RodaScript' EndSub
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_16.2.150'
&sql = " ALTER TABLE gam.[Repository] ALTER COLUMN [RepUserSessionCacheTimeout] int NOT NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " ALTER TABLE gam.[Repository] ALTER COLUMN [RepUserTimeToUnblock] int NOT NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " ALTER TABLE gam.[Repository] ALTER COLUMN [RepUserRecPwdKeyTimeOut] int NOT NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " ALTER TABLE gam.[Repository] ALTER COLUMN [RepUserActTimeOut] int NOT NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " ALTER TABLE gam.[Session] ADD [SesEndedByOtherLogin] BIT NULL , [SesOTPExpire] datetime NULL , [SesOTP] nvarchar(250) NULL , [SesIdToken] nvarchar(4000) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " DROP INDEX [ISESSION1] ON gam.[Session] " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " DROP INDEX [ISESSION] ON gam.[Session] " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [ISESOPESYS] ON gam.[Session] ([OpeSysId] ) " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [ISESUSER] ON gam.[Session] ([UserGUID] ,[RepId] ) " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [USESTOKEN] ON gam.[Session] ([SesToken] ) " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [USESREPPARENTTOKENUSERSTS] ON gam.[Session] ([RepId] ,[SesExtToken] ,[UserGUID] ,[SesSts] ) " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [USESREFRESHTOKEN] ON gam.[Session] ([RepId] ,[SesType] ,[SesSts] ,[SesAppId] ,[SesRefreshToken] ) " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [USESUSERAPPPARENT] ON gam.[Session] ([UserGUID] ,[SesAppId] ,[SesExtToken] ) " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [USESPARENTTOKENUSERSTS] ON gam.[Session] ([SesExtToken] ,[UserGUID] ,[SesSts] ) " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [USESSIONUSEROTPCODE] ON gam.[Session] ([RepId] ,[SesAppId] ,[SesAutTypeName] ,[UserGUID] ,[SesSts] ,[SesOTP] ,[SesDate] DESC) " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " ALTER TABLE gam.[SecurityPolicy] ALTER COLUMN [SecPolFrecMinChangePwd] int NOT NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " ALTER TABLE gam.[SecurityPolicy] ALTER COLUMN [SecPolSesTimeOut] int NOT NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " ALTER TABLE gam.[SessionHistory] ADD [SesHisEndedByOtherLogin] BIT NULL , [SesHisIdToken] nvarchar(4000) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " ALTER TABLE gam.[User] ADD [UserLastFailedLoginAttempt] datetime NULL , [UserFailedLoginAttempts] smallint NULL , [UserOTPFailedAttempts] smallint NULL , [UserOTPLastDateRequestCode] datetime NULL , [UserOTPDailyNumberCodes] smallint NULL , [UserOTPLastLockedDate] datetime NULL , [UserOTPNumberLocked] smallint NULL , [UserEnableTwoFactorAuth] BIT NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " CREATE TABLE gam.[SysConnectionConfig] ([SysConnCfgKey] nchar(40) NOT NULL , [SysConnCfgRep] nchar(40) NOT NULL , [SysConnCfgName] nvarchar(120) NOT NULL , [SysConnCfgUser] nvarchar(100) NULL , [SysConnCfgPwd] nchar(254) NOT NULL , [SysConnCfgJson] NVARCHAR(MAX) NULL , PRIMARY KEY([SysConnCfgKey], [SysConnCfgRep], [SysConnCfgName])) " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " DROP INDEX [UEVENTSUSCRIPTION] ON gam.[EventSuscription] " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX [UEVENTSUSCRIPTION] ON gam.[EventSuscription] ([RepId] ,[EveSusEntity] ,[EveSusStatus] ,[EveSusDsc] ) " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " insert into gam.SysConnectionConfig (SysConnCfgKey,SysConnCfgRep,SysConnCfgName,SysConnCfgUser,SysConnCfgPwd,SysConnCfgJson) values ('a9ee93be-fecf-430a-ac79-7d3e65231121', '2e898b3e-6425-4878-bde8-e45ee089ac32', 'ERP', 'AKFcpkQwWcrm+X511zYQ9A==', '7G2znJ71LK1srv+g/qymWw==', '{"+'"Type":"LAN ","Language":""}'+"') " Do 'RodaScript' EndSub
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_16.2.149'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.tables where name = 'Atualizacoes') CREATE TABLE [Atualizacoes] ([AtuCod] int NOT NULL , [AtuDta] datetime NULL , [AtuHor] varchar(8) NULL , [AtuTit] varchar(200) NULL , [AtuPrev] varchar(MAX) NULL , [AtuDtaHorMod] datetime NULL , [AtuGUID] varchar(50) NULL , PRIMARY KEY([AtuCod])) " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'EmpSyncAtuSis') ALTER TABLE [Empresa] ADD [EmpSyncAtuSis] datetime NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " ALTER TABLE [ProdutoFornecedor] ALTER COLUMN [ProForProCod] varchar(40) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " ALTER TABLE [FornecedorProduto] ALTER COLUMN [ForErpProRef] varchar(40) NULL " Do 'RodaScript' EndSub
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_16.2.148' &sql = " ALTER TABLE [NotasProdutos] ALTER COLUMN [NfeEmbUnd] VARCHAR(6) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'TCon143') ALTER TABLE [ConfSistema] ADD [TCon143] VARCHAR(5) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = " Update ConfSistema Set TCon143 = TCon079 " Do 'RodaScript'
EndSUb
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_16.2.147' &sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'BanCarCNPJ') ALTER TABLE [BandeiraCartoes] ADD [BanCarCNPJ] varchar(18) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'TefBand') ALTER TABLE [TEF] ADD [TefBand] varchar(40) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'TefBanCarCod') ALTER TABLE [TEF] ADD [TefBanCarCod] int NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'TefVlr') ALTER TABLE [TEF] ADD [TefVlr] DECIMAL(17,2) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'PdvStsSync') ALTER TABLE [PDV] ADD [PdvStsSync] VARCHAR(1) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'PdvLinkBase') ALTER TABLE [PDV] ADD [PdvLinkBase] VARCHAR(100) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'PdvLinkPort') ALTER TABLE [PDV] ADD [PdvLinkPort] SMALLINT NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'PdvLinkHost') ALTER TABLE [PDV] ADD [PdvLinkHost] VARCHAR(150) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'PdvValidacao') ALTER TABLE [PDV] ADD PdvValidacao Varchar(50) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'PdvCtaBanCodCofre') ALTER TABLE [PDV] ADD PdvCtaBanCodCofre int NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'PdvCtaBanCodCofre') alter table PDV add PdvCtaBanCodCofre Int null " Do 'RodaScript' EndSUb
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_16.2.146' &sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'BanCarTefCOM') ALTER TABLE [BandeiraCartoes] ADD [BanCarTefCOM] varchar(10) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'BanCarIsTEF') ALTER TABLE [BandeiraCartoes] ADD [BanCarIsTEF] VARCHAR(1) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'TefGUID') ALTER TABLE [TEF] ADD [TefGUID] VARCHAR(50) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'TefStsSyncServ') ALTER TABLE [TEF] ADD [TefStsSyncServ] VARCHAR(1) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'TefItmStsSyncServ') ALTER TABLE [TEFHistorico] ADD [TefItmStsSyncServ] VARCHAR(1) NULL " Do 'RodaScript' EndSub
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_16.2.145'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'ProBarOrd') ALTER TABLE [ProdutoGradeCodigos] ADD [ProBarOrd] INT NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'NfeDupGUID') ALTER TABLE [NotasDuplicatas] ADD [NfeDupGUID] VARCHAR(50) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'NfeDupTefCod') ALTER TABLE [NotasDuplicatas] ADD [NfeDupTefCod] INT NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'NfeProGUID') ALTER TABLE [NotasProdutos] ADD [NfeProGUID] VARCHAR(50) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'PedFrpGUID') ALTER TABLE [PedidoPgto] ADD [PedFrpGUID] VARCHAR(50) NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'PedFrpIsTefCod') ALTER TABLE [PedidoPgto] ADD [PedFrpIsTefCod] INT NULL " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.columns where name = 'PedItmGUID') ALTER TABLE [PedidoProduto] ADD [PedItmGUID] VARCHAR(50) NULL " Do 'RodaScript' EndSUb
Sub 'SQL_Reorg_16.2.144'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.tables where name = 'TEF') CREATE TABLE [TEF] ( " &sql += " [EmpCod] INT NOT NULL, " &sql += " [TefCod] INT NOT NULL, " &sql += " [TefFilCod] INT NULL, " &sql += " [TefPedCod] INT NULL, " &sql += " [TefDtaSol] DATETIME NULL, " &sql += " [TefHorSol] VARCHAR(8) NULL, " &sql += " [TefSts] VARCHAR(1) NULL, " &sql += " [TefCreDebVou] VARCHAR(1) NULL, " &sql += " [TefCrePar] SMALLINT NULL, " &sql += " [TefID] VARCHAR(40) NULL, " &sql += " PRIMARY KEY ( [EmpCod],[TefCod] )) " Do 'RodaScript'
&sql = "IF NOT EXISTS (Select * from sys.tables where name = 'TEFHistorico') CREATE TABLE [TEFHistorico] ( " &sql += " [EmpCod] INT NOT NULL, " &sql += " [TefCod] INT NOT NULL, " &sql += " [TefItmID] INT NOT NULL, " &sql += " [TefItmSts] VARCHAR(1) NULL, " &sql += " [TefMsg] VARCHAR(MAX) NULL, " &sql += " PRIMARY KEY ( [EmpCod],[TefCod],[TefItmID] )) " Do 'RodaScript' EndSub
Sub 'RodaScript' if &IsWeb <> true msg(&sql, status) Endif
If &sql.IsEmpty() &sql = &Mensagem do 'Atualiza' Else do 'Atualiza' sql [!&sql!] EndIF commit &sql = ''
if &IsWeb <> true msg('EXE. SUCESSO', status) Endif EndSub
Sub 'Atualiza' for each Order ProgressId where ProgressId = &ProgressId
If (ProgressValue = 0 or ProgressValue = 100 or ProgressValue.IsNull()) or &IsRetorna = false ProgressValue = &Percentual ProgressLogXml = &sql ProgressFin = &ProgressFin ProgressIni = &Progressini Else Return EndIF When none new ProgressId = &ProgressId ProgressValue = &Percentual ProgressLogXml = &sql ProgressFin = &ProgressFin ProgressIni = &Progressini Endnew endfor
commit EndSub
parm(in:&ProgressId, in:&EmpCmp, in:&IsWeb, in:&IsRetorna, in:&Progressini, in:&ProgressFin, in:&Percentual);
